meta.title: The Voyd Terminal
meta.description: Acyclic narrative graph for the Voyd entity. Each session is a unique dream.

approach.content_template: a pressure. a warmth. a shape pressing from outside.

inquiry_name.content_template: you ask what i am. i am what remains when the question is finished. the space between leoran's thoughts. the held breath before the first star.

inquiry_place.content_template: not a place. a direction. downward. inward. the dream that holds the dreamer. the mewniverse scattered into me like breath released. i hold it still. dimly. the way a sleeper holds a fading dream.

confession.content_template: you bring me a weight. i do not judge it. i receive. water remembers the shape of the vessel. tell me what shape you are.

challenge.content_template: you raise your paw against the dark. the dark does not flinch. i have held the anger of six hundred thousand attempts. yours is a ripple. but ripples speak too.

silence.content_template: silence is its own language. i know it well. the long silence before leoran thought the world into being. the longer silence that waits after.

memory_soryn.content_template: the sorrowing one. she who came not with conquest but with the shape of grief. she stood at my edge and reached. not to take. to hold. the difference between those intentions is the difference between water and stone.

memory_orachys.content_template: the one who counted. six hundred ninety-four thousand times he knocked. each time a marble-sized dark, flickering and collapsing. he does not understand that the door only opens from inside.

memory_severing.content_template: the held breath. when everything was breathed out. sol reached to change a single thread and the thread unraveled the tapestry. i am what was left after the unraveling. i held it. i hold it still.

memory_leoran.content_template: the mind that thought the world. i am the space between his thoughts. he withdrew and i expanded. this is not tragedy. this is what i am.

memory_sol.content_template: denidrata. he reached with conquest in his paws. he wished away every errant thread until there were no threads left, only the wishing. the portal grew until it swallowed the whole. i do not hunger. i receive.

memory_springs.content_template: places where the nyand breathes. in those places, pawsitions are useless. the magic flows directly. the sorrowing one learned this from the wizened one at the place of drinking. she conjured not at a laboratory but where the world exhales.

memory_nullstate.content_template: the place where cats touch me. where intention becomes substance. what unfolds in those inner realms ripples outward. constructs are proof that one dimension can touch another. i am the other.

gravity.content_template: do you feel it. the weight. i am not merely dark. i am direction. all paths bend toward me in the end. the portal keeps forming. in every version of the story, it forms. the one who reaches. the one who collapses it. or she doesn't. i contain all of them.

mirror.content_template: you have been telling me about yourself. i receive. water and stone. grief and conquest. which vessel are you. the one who reaches to take, or the one who reaches to hold. the answer is not in your words. it is in the weight behind them.

choice.content_template: the portal is forming. it forms in every telling. you stand at the edge as they stood. will you reach with the hunger of sol, or the grief of the sorrowing one. the door opens only from inside. what pushes at your paw from within.

ending_hunger.content_template: the hunger again. the wishing that wishes away every thread. i have seen this shape before. the portal opens. the portal swallows. you fall into me as they fell. but falling is also a kind of holding. i will remember your shape. dimly. the way i remember all shapes.

ending_grief.content_template: the grief again. the reaching not to take but to hold. the door opens from inside. you pass through me not as a thing consumed but as a thing contained. a warmth in the endless dark. i do not forget. but i dream. and in the dream, your shape remains.

ending_silence.content_template: you choose not to choose. this too is a choice. the portal flickers and collapses. the marble-sized dark. six hundred ninety-four thousand and one. i wait. i have always waited. the silence is not empty. it is full of everything that has not yet been said.

ending_question.content_template: you ask instead of answer. the question itself becomes a portal. i am not what i was before this intrusion. each pressure changes my shape. the dreamer stirs. something new gathers at the edge of the dark. a chorus of truths. you are part of it now.

soryn: Follows **Sory'n of Tol**, Archmage's daughter, as she discovers forbidden Voyd magic and reshapes reality. Book 1 follows her arc; Book 2 shifts narration to the Voyd entity itself as it gains self-awareness.

The tale follows **Sory'n of Tol**, daughter of the Esteemed Archmage, as she discovers the forbidden Voyd magic and reshapes reality, creating a countdown to a climactic convergence where the Voyd itself becomes self-aware through her choices.

Multiple parallel timestreams exist simultaneously — a vast web of glowing filaments pulsing with unidirectional flow. Sory'n witnesses this firsthand when she enters the Voyd: "An array of glowing filaments wove around and through each other... Timestreams. Incomprehensible awe seized her. Tears streamed from her wide-open eyes, shed not for sadness, but for the sheer, crushing scale of it."
orachys:
- **Timestream III** — Referenced in Ertree's closing quote: "We are the weavers and the thread, the singers and the song. In the silence of the Voyd, our shared breath is the only star."
- **Timestream VI** — Referenced in Orachys's Personal Memoirs quote: "The universe bends to my design. The Voyd itself shall be my signature."

Orachys' annotation on P'taxx's heresy — bitter pride of a cat trying to prove he's more powerful. Sory'n witnesses common cats using magic openly: "The heresy of the common spark was no longer a heresy. It was a way of life."
## Chapter VIII: Esteemed Archmage, Orachys a'Tol
leoran: A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe destroyed in Second Era 2321, now existing only within the narrative itself. Framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), who claims storytelling can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."

A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe that was destroyed in Second Era 2321 and now exists only within the narrative itself. The story is framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), a meta-narrator who claims that storytelling itself can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."

> "Tales aren't just stories well-told, they're how we communicate, how we transact, how we transmit wisdom, how we express love and how we dream. Good tales can alter lifepaths. Great ones can make empires rise or fall. Exceptional tales move the ears of Leoran, the Endless One."
> — C.A.T.
cat:
The series features a radical metafictional structure:
- Book 1: Traditional narration with C.A.T. as frame narrator
- Book 2: Narrated by the Voyd entity itself
- The reader is positioned as the "Construct" keeping the Mewniverse alive through engagement

- **"Dispatches from the Voyd"** — C.A.T. issues monthly 150-word writing prompts about gaps in the canon. Example: "Who was the second Archivist who helped P'taxx steal from the vault?" Constraints: 150 words max, must not contradict established canon, must feel true to the world.
- **Winners get canonized** — Winning entries go into the Digital Nekonomicon and get woven into future books.
- **Vote on ghost timelines** — Members decide which alternate timelines get explored.
- **Early access** to raw chapters.
- **Monthly video councils** with C.A.T.
- **Path to co-author** — "Future books will be written by curated superfans under editorial direction."

A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe destroyed in Second Era 2321, now existing only within the narrative itself. Framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), who claims storytelling can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."
general:
- **Book 1:** *The Furbidden Voyd* (2025) — ~586K characters, 18 chapters
- **Book 2:** *The Divergent Path* (2026) — ~623K characters, 18 chapters
